basic_details.job_title: DCHS West Godavari Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 29 Paramedical and Supporting Staff Posts
basic_details.organization_name: District Controller of Health Services (DCHS West Godavari)
basic_details.short_information: District Controller of Health Services (DCHS West Godavari) Paramedical and Supporting Staff Notification 2026 has been released on 19 June 2026 on the official website westgodavari.nic.in. A total of 29 vacancies have been announced through the DCHS West Godavari Paramedical and Supporting Staff Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 42 years for all posts. Age Relaxation: SC/ST/BC/EWS: 5 years; Ex-Servicemen: 3 years in addition to service; Differently abled: 10 years. Maximum with all relaxations: 52 years.

qualification.education_qualification: SSC/10th or equivalent, Intermediate (VOC MLT)/DMLT/B.Sc(MLT) with APPMB registration, Diploma in Electrical trade, Diploma in Dark Room Assistant/Radiography/X-ray technology, Lab Attendant Course or Intermediate (Lab Attendant Vocational Course)
qualification.details: General Duty Attender: Must have passed SSC/10th class or its equivalent from a recognized Board. Theatre Assistant: Must have passed SSC/10th or its equivalent. Lab Attendant: Must have passed SSC/10th or its equivalent. Must possess Lab Attendant Course or Intermediate (Lab Attendant Vocational Course) conducted by the Board of Intermediate Education, AP or from any other institution recognized by the Govt of A.P. Post Mortem Assistant: Must have passed SSC/10th class or its equivalent from a recognized Board. Dark Room Assistant (DRA): Must hold a certificate of diploma in dark room assistant training from a recognized institution by the Government of AP (OR) Radiography OR X-ray technology i.e., CRA OR DMIT etc from an institution recognized by the Government of Andhra Pradesh. Lab Technician Gr-II: Must possess Intermediate (VOC MLT) or DMLT or BSC(MLT). If intermediate (VOC) with one year apprenticeship in Govt. Hospitals. Must be registered in APPMB. In case of candidate possess both DMLT and B.Sc.MLT, the maximum percentage secured in any of the above shall be considered. Electrician: Must have passed SSC/10th or its equivalent. Diploma in Electrical trade. If a person possesses both diploma and ITI certificate, the maximum percentage of marks obtained in either of the course shall be considered.

salary_details.details: General Duty Attender, Theatre Assistant, Lab Attendant, Post Mortem Assistant: Rs. 15000/- Per Month Electrician: Rs. 22460/- Per Month Dark Room Assistant (DRA): Rs. 28220/- Per Month Lab Technician Gr-II: Rs. 32670/- Per Month

selection_process: Aggregate marks in qualifying examination (75%) Experience weightage up to 10 marks Contract/Outsourcing/COVID service weightage up to 15% Counselling on merit basis following roster points
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for DCHS West Godavari Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.westgodavari.nic.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 06-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: DCHS West Godavari Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the DCHS West Godavari Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download DCHS West Godavari Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: DCHS West Godavari Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: General Duty Attender: Must have passed SSC/10th class or its equivalent from a recognized Board. Theatre Assistant: Must have passed SSC/10th or its equivalent. Lab Attendant: Must have passed SSC/10th or its equivalent. Must possess Lab Attendant Course or Intermediate (Lab Attendant Vocational Course) conducted by the Board of Intermediate Education, AP or from any other institution recognized by the Govt of A.P. Post Mortem Assistant: Must have passed SSC/10th class or its equivalent from a recognized Board. Dark Room Assistant (DRA): Must hold a certificate of diploma in dark room assistant training from a recognized institution by the Government of AP (OR) Radiography OR X-ray technology i.e., CRA OR DMIT etc from an institution recognized by the Government of Andhra Pradesh. Lab Technician Gr-II: Must possess Intermediate (VOC MLT) or DMLT or BSC(MLT). If intermediate (VOC) with one year apprenticeship in Govt. Hospitals. Must be registered in APPMB. In case of candidate possess both DMLT and B.Sc.MLT, the maximum percentage secured in any of the above shall be considered. Electrician: Must have passed SSC/10th or its equivalent. Diploma in Electrical trade. If a person possesses both diploma and ITI certificate, the maximum percentage of marks obtained in either of the course shall be considered.

content_sections.heading: DCHS West Godavari Age Limit 2026
content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 42 years for all posts. Age Relaxation: SC/ST/BC/EWS: 5 years; Ex-Servicemen: 3 years in addition to service; Differently abled: 10 years. Maximum with all relaxations: 52 years.

content_sections.heading: DCHS West Godavari Salary 2026
content_sections.text: General Duty Attender, Theatre Assistant, Lab Attendant, Post Mortem Assistant: Rs. 15000/- Per Month Electrician: Rs. 22460/- Per Month Dark Room Assistant (DRA): Rs. 28220/- Per Month Lab Technician Gr-II: Rs. 32670/- Per Month

content_sections.heading: DCHS West Godavari Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates

rows.event: Last Date for Submission of Physical Applications

content_sections.heading: DCHS West Godavari Selection Process 2026
content_sections.text: Aggregate marks in qualifying examination (75%) Experience weightage up to 10 marks Contract/Outsourcing/COVID service weightage up to 15% Counselling on merit basis following roster points

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for DCHS West Godavari Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: www.westgodavari.nic.in. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 06-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: DCHS West Godavari Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for DCHS West Godavari Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application for the DCHS West Godavari Paramedical and Supporting Staff posts is 06-07-2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Paramedical and Supporting Staff posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 29 vacancies for various Paramedical and Supporting Staff positions announced by DCHS West Godavari.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for DCHS West Godavari Recruitment 2026 is offline. Candidates need to download the form and send it via post.

faq.question: Q4. What is the maximum age limit for the applicants?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all posts is 42 years, with relaxations applicable for reserved categories.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary structure for the selected candidates?
faq.answer: The salary ranges from Rs. 15,000 to Rs. 32,670 per month, depending on the post.

faq.question: Q6. What are the minimum educational qualifications required?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification varies by post, ranging from SSC/10th pass to Intermediate (VOC MLT)/DMLT/B.Sc(MLT) with specific registrations.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for SC/ST candidates?
faq.answer: Yes, SC/ST candidates are required to pay an application fee of Rs. 250/-.

faq.question: Q8. How is the selection process conducted?
faq.answer: Selection is based on aggregate marks in the qualifying examination, experience weightage, contract/outsourcing/COVID service weightage, and counselling on merit.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I download the application form?
faq.answer: The application form can be downloaded from the official website of DCHS West Godavari, which is www.westgodavari.nic.in.

faq.question: Q10. What is the validity period of the merit list?
faq.answer: The merit list for this recruitment will be valid until 21 June 2027.
